Therefore, we map the chosen plan to the ratings for 'HealthFirst Standard Plan' under physical health (rating 8), mental health (rating 8), and we assume the same plan name extends to property and travel elements (though property and travel categories do not have a 'HealthFirst Standard Plan', the assistant likely reused the same brand for all coverages).
